items.title: Partial derivatives
items.description: When a function has multiple inputs, partial derivatives extend the derivative idea one coordinate at a time.

items.title: Chain rule
items.description: Composing functions requires the chain rule—the backbone of backpropagation through layered models.

items.title: Gradient descent
items.description: Optimization uses derivatives (gradients) to iteratively reduce loss surfaces.

items.title: Loss surfaces
items.description: Derivatives describe local slope on loss surfaces plotted over parameters.
